tasks.title: Add fuzzy public cohort search ranking
tasks.objective: Extend public cohort search so exact matches rank first while typo-tolerant or semi-relevant matches still appear lower in results.
authority: Use a dependency-free fuzzy matching strategy unless the app stack changes.
Rank exact or stronger public-field matches above weaker fuzzy matches.
Search only public-safe fields already eligible for public cohort discovery.
Do not expose private links or non-public statuses through search.
acceptance_criteria: A minor typo such as `tost` can still surface a cohort containing `test`.
Exact matches rank ahead of fuzzy/semi-relevant matches.
Search remains case-insensitive and handles multi-word input predictably.
No-results state remains available when no reasonable public match exists.
Tests cover typo matching, ranking, and public visibility safety.
verification: Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when fuzzy matching and exact-first ranking are verified.
